# HPD.ML.Core.LambdaTransform

- Package: `HPD-ML-Core` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Kind: `class`

User-defined row transform via lambda. Escape hatch for one-off transformations. Not serializable. Not AOT-friendly (captures closure). Use sparingly.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class LambdaTransform : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ITransform
```

